subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ghani! Hearken unto the call of the All-Glorious, the Most Exalted, in the most wondrous and sweetest tongue. This is the Day wherein every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالغنی بشنو ندای غنی متعال را بلسان ابدع احلی الیوم یومی است که باید هر
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @collection; ordering of the Sacred Writings, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
